title: Energizing Thai Meat Larb
description: Funky, flaky, and energizing, this Thai dish from Isan is a perfect way to spice up your meal. The combination of gherkin relish and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients will keep you going all day.

ingredients.name: Grass-fed beef
ingredients.notes: Choose lean cuts for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: Gherkin relish
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, it's up to you.

ingredients.name: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best taste.

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for a stronger umami flavor.

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a bain-marie over low heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add grass-fed beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add chili flakes, fish sauce, and low-carb soy sauce. Cook for 1 minute, until the flavors meld together.
Add gherkin relish, stir-frying until heated through.
Stir in chopped Thai basil, lime juice, and scallions.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
